book.title: VAULT B
book.author: Kapil Gupta
book.tagline: Book One of the Meera Desai Thrillers

beats: Beneath an ancient temple, a vault has stayed sealed for two thousand years.
When her father's notebook is stolen, Meera Desai is pulled into the mystery.
Its secret could be worth more than a trillion dollars.
Some doors were never meant to open.
